input_summary: A retail bank's analytics team is operating a 12-year-old on-premise data warehouse that is no longer supported by the vendor. Query performance has degraded significantly — reports that previously ran in 10 minutes now take 4–6 hours. The team wants to migrate to a cloud-native data platform to restore reporting SLAs, enable self-serve analytics for business users, and reduce infrastructure maintenance cost. A phased migration is required because the existing system cannot be taken offline — it feeds 14 mission-critical reports used daily by the risk and compliance team.

people_and_roles.value: Risk and compliance team (critical report consumers)
people_and_roles.source_text: 14 mission-critical reports used daily by the risk and compliance team
enable self-serve analytics for business users

systems_and_tools.source_text: 12-year-old on-premise data warehouse that is no longer supported by the vendor

systems_and_tools.value: 14 mission-critical compliance reports (feeds from legacy DWH)
systems_and_tools.source_text: feeds 14 mission-critical reports used daily by the risk and compliance team

systems_and_tools.value: Target cloud-native data platform (not yet selected)
systems_and_tools.source_text: migrate to a cloud-native data platform

processes.value: Daily compliance reporting pipeline (legacy DWH → 14 reports)
processes.source_text: 14 mission-critical reports used daily by the risk and compliance team
reports that previously ran in 10 minutes now take 4–6 hours

business_objectives.value: Restore reporting SLAs — all reports complete within 30 minutes
Enable self-serve analytics for business users without IT involvement
business_objectives.source_text: enable self-serve analytics for business users

business_objectives.value: Reduce infrastructure maintenance and licensing cost
Migrate without disrupting daily compliance reporting
business_objectives.source_text: existing system cannot be taken offline — it feeds 14 mission-critical reports

pain_points.source_text: reports that previously ran in 10 minutes now take 4–6 hours
